title: TimeSpan Class
description: Represents a control that displays a timespan or duration value.

constructors.name: constructor(element?: HTMLElement)
constructors.description: Initializes a new instance of the TimeSpan class from element.

parameters.name: element
parameters.description: The element for which to create TimeSpan control.

properties.name: readonly element: HTMLElement
properties.description: Gets the root element of the control.

properties.name: readonly elementInput: HTMLElement
properties.description: Gets the input element of the control.

properties.name: readonly focused: boolean
properties.description: Gets a value indicating whether the control have input focus.

properties.name: value?: number
properties.description: Gets or sets the value in milliseconds.

properties.name: min?: number
properties.description: Gets or sets the minimum allowed value.

properties.name: max?: number
properties.description: Gets or sets the maxium allowed value.

properties.name: step: number
properties.description: Gets or sets the amount to increment or decrement when the up or down arrow keys are pressed.

properties.name: stepViaWheel: boolean
properties.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the control can accept step changes via the mouse wheel.

properties.name: strictness: number
properties.description: Gets or sets the strictness level for parsing the input text value.
remarks: When strictness equal 0, the /^(-?((\d*\.)?\d+)(d|h|m|s|(ms)) *)*$/ will be used.

properties.name: decimalSeparator: string
properties.description: Gets or sets the decimal separator character.
properties.remarks: The default value is the locale’s decimal separator.

properties.name: thousandSeparator: string
properties.description: Gets or sets the thousand separator character
properties.remarks: The default value is the locale’s thousand separator.

properties.name: nullable: boolean
properties.description: Gets or sets whether the value can be null.

properties.name: readonly: boolean
properties.description: Gets or sets whether the control is not mutable, meaning the user can not edit the control.

events.name: timespanchange
events.description: The change event is fired when the user modifies and commits the value.

static_methods.name: isValid
static_methods.description: Checks whether the timespan text is valid.

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: The input string to be checked.

parameters.name: option
parameters.description: The options for parsing the value.

returns.description: Returns false if the timespan text is invalid.

static_methods.name: parse
static_methods.description: Returns a floating-point number representing milliseconds, parsed from the given string specified language-sensitive representation.

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: The input string to be parsed.

parameters.name: option
parameters.description: The options for parsing the value.

description: Returns NaN if the timespan text is invalid.

static_methods.remarks: This method calls <mark>isValid</mark> before parsing. If <mark>isValid</mark> returns <mark>false</mark>, the method returns <mark>NaN</mark>.

static_methods.name: format
static_methods.description: Formats a timespan value into an array of Nodes representing the timespan.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: The timespan value to be formated.

parameters.name: option
parameters.description: The options for formating the value.

description: Returns NaN if the timespan text is invalid.

static_methods.remarks: If value is <mark>null</mark> or <mark>NaN</mark>, return empty array.
